alkylation reagent: treated with 10 mM iodoacetamide in a 50 μl reaction volume
enrichment method: with a cassette encoding a Flag affinity-tag
fractionation method: fractionated into six fractions using the High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit
fragmentation method: CID NCE for MS2 was set at 32
instrument: analyzed on the Orbitrap Fusion Lumos instrument
labeling: For SILAC experiments, cells were cultured in SILAC DMEM
reduction reagent: 1 μl of 1 M dithiothreitol (DTT) to stop the reaction
